summary: External host symlink is classified external_symlink, represented in skill.list/skill.get/totals, and install.skill rejects without filesystem/DB side effects.
RemoveSkillDialog has dialog role, aria-modal, label/description wiring, and the assertion is covered by passing Vitest suite.
Owner moved copy/rsync install mode to Phase 2. Current release scope is symlink install only, so this case is not a blocker for the first release.

Owner-approved release-scope waiver: unsigned/ad-hoc DMG distribution is acceptable for this phase with README/Gatekeeper bypass guidance; Apple signing/notarization deferred until Apple credentials are available.
decision_basis: Owner accepted unsigned/ad-hoc macOS distribution for the current release scope because packaged unsigned DMG smoke passed and signing/notarization depends on unavailable Apple credentials.

waiver.reason: Unsigned/ad-hoc DMG distribution is acceptable for this phase with README/Gatekeeper bypass guidance.
waiver.mitigation: Document Gatekeeper bypass guidance for users and keep packaged smoke evidence from the release-full rerun.
waiver.follow_up: Return to Apple signing and notarization when Apple credentials are available.
waiver.applies_to: current run and current release phase

residual_risk: macOS users may see Gatekeeper warnings until the app is signed and notarized.
